snippet: Hello denisvalerievichmayorov1, You've reached 90% of your session limit for your free plan. Your usage resets in in 22 minutes, or you can upgrade your plan for higher limits: Upgrade Ollama Just
subject: Ollama session usage at 90%
body:
Hello denisvalerievichmayorov1,
 
You've reached 90% of your session limit for your free plan. Your usage resets in in 22 minutes, or you can upgrade your plan for
higher limits:
 

Upgrade Ollama [https://ollama.com/pricing]

 
Just a as a heads up, you can view your usage at any time or disable these notifications here [https://ollama.com/settings].
 
If you have any questions, feel free to reach out. We’re here to help!
 
– The Ollama Team
